title: My Life in Versailles (KIFF 2026)
synopsis: After her parents’ passing, eight-year-old Violet goes to live with her uncle, Regis, a gruff maintenance worker at the Palace of Versailles. Despite a rocky start, Violet and Regis learn to live and face life’s challenges together. Through complex friendships, first loves and a Christmas trip to Violet’s grandparents, they slowly create a new life rich in discoveries and tender moments in the heart of Versailles.

synopsis_lang.en: After her parents’ passing, eight-year-old Violet goes to live with her uncle, Regis, a gruff maintenance worker at the Palace of Versailles. Despite a rocky start, Violet and Regis learn to live and face life’s challenges together. Through complex friendships, first loves and a Christmas trip to Violet’s grandparents, they slowly create a new life rich in discoveries and tender moments in the heart of Versailles.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 八歲的維奧蕾父母去世了，她要搬去和脾氣古怪的叔叔雷吉斯居住。雷吉斯是凡爾賽宮裡的一位維修工。雖然一開始相處不太順利，但維奧蕾和雷吉斯漸漸學會陪伴彼此，一起面對生活中的挑戰。透過結識新朋友、經歷一段刻骨銘心的感情、和去探望公公婆婆的聖誕之旅，他們在凡爾賽宮慢慢建立起驚喜而溫馨的新生活。

director_lang.zh_hk: 克萊門斯瑪德蓮佩迪拉、納撒尼爾赫利米

subtitle: Chinese
